summary: Completed comprehensive testing of trading card scanner app front/back image functionality. All core features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Save button may remain disabled even when both front and back images are uploaded via file input
ui_bugs.workaround: API works correctly when called directly, core functionality not affected

passed_tests: POST /api/cards with image_front_base64 and image_back_base64 fields
POST /api/cards/analyze-base64 with front and back side parameters
Scanner page Front/Back toggle buttons functionality
Scanner page image status indicators (Front ✓/✗, Back ✓/✗)
Card detail page displays both front and back images correctly
Dashboard card grid uses image_front_base64 for thumbnails
Form field validation and data entry
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: Review Scanner page save button validation logic to ensure it properly enables when both front and back images are uploaded via file input. The core functionality works correctly via API.
